criteria.criterion: TypeScript is configured in strict mode (strict: true in tsconfig.json) and tsc --noEmit passes with zero errors
Tailwind CSS v4 is configured and the PostCSS config references @tailwindcss/postcss
App Router directory structure includes src/app/layout.tsx that defines root metadata (title, description) and font imports
src/app/page.tsx renders a meaningful landing page placeholder (not just create-next-app default boilerplate)
next.config.ts configures TypeScript strict checking and exports a NextConfig object with at least one custom setting
